Omar Chehab
Posts Publications Talks Teaching

Hi there - I am Omar, a Ph.D. student in the MIND team at Inria, Université Paris-Saclay, working with Alexandre Gramfort and Aapo Hyvärinen. I’m currently interested in learning energy-based models with contrastive and self-supervised methods.

My work is funded by European (ERC) and French (ANR) grants “Signal And Learning Applied To Brain Data” and “Bridging Artificial Intelligence and Neuroscience”. I am also affiliated to NeuroSpin.

News

  • 03/2021 Our work is featured in towardsdatascience, as March Must-Reads

  • 08/2020 Our work is featured in Andrew Ng’s Deep Learning Newsletter The Batch!, as ‘Unlabeled Brain Waves Spill Secrets’

The website template is Lena Voita’s.

Last updated August 12, 2022.
